TextView.android:text:
Purpose of the Platform
CiviReport is a digital platform designed to allow residents to report community issues within their barangay and enable barangay officials to monitor, manage, and respond to these reports efficiently. The platform aims to improve transparency, communication, and service delivery between citizens and local government units.

User Accounts
To access certain features of the platform, users may be required to create an account.
Users agree to:
• Provide accurate and complete information during registration.
• Maintain the confidentiality of their login credentials.
• Be responsible for all activities conducted under their account.
CiviReport administrators reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms of Service.

User Content
Users may submit reports, descriptions, images, and other content related to barangay concerns.
By submitting content, users agree that:
• The information provided is truthful and not misleading.
• The content does not violate any laws or infringe on the rights of others.
• The platform administrators may review, moderate, or remove content that is inappropriate, abusive, or unrelated to barangay issues.

Acceptable Use
Users agree not not to:
• Use the platform for illegal activities.
• Submit false reports or spam content.
• Harass, threaten, or abuse other users or barangay officials.
• Attempt to access restricted areas of the system without authorization.
Violation of these rules may result in account suspension or permanent removal from the platform.

Limitation of Liability
CiviReport serves as a reporting and tracking platform and does not guarantee immediate resolution of submitted issues.
The platform developers and administrators are not liable for:
• Delays in response from barangay officials
• Inaccurate information submitted by users
• Temporary service interruptions or technical issues

Changes to Terms
CiviReport reserves the right to modify or update these Terms of Service at any time. Users will be notified of significant changes through the platform. Continued use of the platform indicates acceptance of the updated terms.

Governing Law
These Terms of Service shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws and regulations of the Republic of the Philippines.

CheckBox.android:text: I have read and agree to the Terms and Service
